title: Application of p-Dimethylaminoanil of 2-Thiopheneglyoxal in Gravimetric Estimation of Ruthenium(III), Rhodium(III), lridium(III) and Platinum(IV)
author: R. K. UPADHYAY
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemistry Department, N. R. E. C. College, Khurja-203 131 

  Manuscript received 10 July 1986, revised 18 March 1987, accepted 22 April 1987  

  p -Dimethylaminoanil of 2-thiopheneglyoxal, which precipitates several platinum metal ions in alkaline medium at different pH, has been used as gravimetric reagent in the estimation of Ru III  ,  Rh III , Ir III  and Pt IV  cations individually.
